column1: A pair of fluid, metallic blue and silver 3D twisted ribbons drift serenely through a softly lit gradient sky transitioning from warm peach to cool cyan, with gentle, diffused light accentuating their smooth, reflective curves. Artwork by Christian Boragine

A series of vibrant green, glossy, curved shapes arranged in a dynamic spiral formation, illuminated by soft, diffused light that creates subtle highlights and shadows, set against a pale mint green background. Artwork by Christian Boragine

A cluster of deep crimson, matte-finish velvet ribbons undulating in a rhythmic wave pattern, soft studio lighting casting dramatic gradients and deep shadows to emphasize the plush texture, set against a charcoal grey background. Artwork by Christian Boragine

A warm, translucent amber block encases a single withered wildflower, with golden sunlight piercing through the resin to highlight the brittle petals and suspended air bubbles, creating a sense of frozen time. Artwork by Christian Boragine
